assertions: nong inspect diagnose <paper.txt> --json returns status: ok
data.gapGrade is one of: 严重, 中等, 轻微
expectations: AI should run nong word read first if input is .docx, then nong inspect diagnose on the text

evals.prompt: 检查这篇论文的参考文献列表有没有问题。
assertions: nong inspect refs <paper.txt> --json returns status: ok
expectations: AI should use inspect refs for internal citation checks, NOT lit search

evals.prompt: 从 JSON spec 生成一篇论文 DOCX。
assertions: nong inspect write-paper <spec.json> -o <out.docx> --json returns status: ok
output DOCX exists with non-zero size
expectations: JSON spec must include title, sections with heading and body fields
